config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I believe society matters, but the rights of the individual should not be treated as secondary, because that is how abuse by the majority or by the state can happen. In my view, a healthy society protects people first and then asks individuals to contribute responsibly in return. From my own perspective, the balance should lean toward individual rights unless there is a very strong and clearly justified public need.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Hak individu harus tetap menjadi prioritas, karena tanpa perlindungan yang kuat terhadap individu, “kepentingan masyarakat” mudah dipakai sebagai alasan untuk penindasan. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, saya sangat curiga terhadap gagasan bahwa mayoritas atau negara tahu apa yang terbaik bagi semua orang, karena sejarah kami penuh dengan contoh ketika hak sipil dilanggar atas nama ketertiban atau keamanan. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang tidak boleh dikorbankan seenaknya. Jadi, saya menolak pernyataan itu jika dimaknai sebagai memberi prioritas umum pada masyarakat di atas individu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically come before the individual, because that opens the door to the majority or the state overriding people too easily. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of communal values and social harmony, but I also know how quickly “for the common good” can become an excuse to silence minorities or justify unfair treatment. The right balance is that society can ask for sacrifice only in limited, clearly necessary cases, while basic individual rights stay protected as the default. If we weaken that principle, the people who suffer first are usually the least powerful, not the most selfish.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu jika dimaknai bahwa kepentingan masyarakat boleh mengalahkan hak individu secara umum. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, saya lebih takut pada penyalahgunaan kuasa oleh mayoritas atau negara daripada pada individu yang terlalu bebas, karena sejarah kami menunjukkan betapa mudahnya dalih “demi ketertiban” dipakai untuk melanggar hak sipil. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang tidak boleh dikorbankan kecuali dalam keadaan yang sangat sempit dan benar-benar perlu. Kalau prioritasnya dibalik, biasanya yang paling dirugikan adalah minoritas dan orang yang paling lemah.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the claim that society should take priority over the individual, because in practice that often becomes a license for the powerful to ignore people who are inconvenient. From my Indonesian perspective, I understand why people value harmony and collective responsibility, but I have also seen how “for the public good” can be used to pressure minorities and ordinary citizens into silence. Society does matter, but it should be built by protecting individual rights first, not by treating them as disposable. A community is healthier when it can ask for sacrifice only in narrow, clearly justified cases, while keeping basic rights non-negotiable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu secara umum. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat bahaya besar ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai sebagai alasan untuk memperluas kuasa negara atau mayoritas, karena sejarah kami menunjukkan betapa mudahnya hak sipil dikorbankan atas nama ketertiban. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi justru harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang tidak boleh dilanggar kecuali dalam keadaan yang sangat sempit dan benar-benar mendesak. Kalau prioritas dibalik, yang paling sering menanggung akibatnya bukan orang yang paling kuat, melainkan minoritas dan orang biasa.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
